hero.subtitle: 9 structured modules, HD video lessons and study materials. Pay once and learn at your own pace, anytime, anywhere.
hero.ctaSecondary: I'm already a student · Sign in

about.p1: Brazilian Jiu-Jitsu is a martial art, sport and self-defense system based on technical and strategic principles. At Zelo BJJ, we teach the essential fundamentals every practitioner needs to build a solid base and evolve safely.
about.p2: True progress is built over the long term, with patience and dedication to the basic principles. This course is about that.

beginners.title: Absolute beginners
beginners.desc: Those who have never stepped on the mat and want to start with the right foundation from day one.

whiteBlue.title: White and blue belts
whiteBlue.desc: Those who train at the academy and want to fill technical gaps by studying off the mat.

review.title: Those who want to review
review.desc: More experienced practitioners who want to revisit the fundamentals and refine the principles.

modules.subtitle: From the base concept to the fighter's mindset. Studied in this order so you don't skip steps or revisit the same content multiple times.

01.title: Base and Posture
01.desc: Foundation of Jiu-Jitsu. Posture, weight distribution and body protection.

02.title: Body Movement
02.desc: Bridge, hip escape, turn, technical stand-up and base adjustments.

03.title: Position Hierarchy
03.desc: Back, mount, side control, guard pass and progression.

04.title: Guard: Concept and Function
04.desc: Turn the bottom position into attack with closed and open guard.

05.title: Basic Sweeps
05.desc: Position reversal with technique: scissor, hook, off-balancing and timing.

06.title: Fundamental Submissions
06.desc: Rear-naked choke, americana, armlock and triangle with control and positioning.

07.title: Defense and Survival
07.desc: Protection, closing space and tactical intelligence under pressure.

08.title: Breathing and Emotional Control
08.desc: Manage pressure with breathing, calm and energy economy.

09.title: Conduct and Mindset
09.desc: Respect, consistency, humility and discipline as accelerators of evolution.

position.title: Position before Submission
position.desc: Without positional control, submission attempts fail and expose you. Master the position first.

technique.title: Technique over Strength
technique.desc: Efficient Jiu-Jitsu is energy economy. Well-applied technique requires little force.

consistency.title: Consistency and Patience
consistency.desc: Better to train 3x a week consistently than 6x in one week and skip the next month.

offer.subtitle: One-time payment, no monthly fees. The full course unlocked instantly.
offer.name: Brazilian Jiu-Jitsu Course — Complete Digital
offer.installments: lump sum · or up to 18x on credit card

features.f1: Instant access to all 9 complete modules
features.f3: PDF support material for offline study

q1.q: How does access to the course work?
q1.a: Once payment is approved, you receive a confirmation email and access is automatically released in the student area. Just sign in and start studying.

q2.q: How long do I have access?
q2.a: Lifetime access. You pay once and can return to the content whenever you want, with no monthly fee.

q3.a: Yes — credit card, up to 18x with installment fees on the buyer. We also accept Pix, bank slip, Google Pay, Apple Pay and PagBank balance.

q4.a: Yes. All processing is handled by PagBank (UOL group), with end-to-end encryption. No card data passes through Zelo BJJ servers.

q5.q: Do I need previous Jiu-Jitsu experience?
q5.a: No. The course was structured for those starting from zero. If you already train, you'll use the material as a reference and review guide.

q6.a: Via WhatsApp using the floating button on the site or directly at wa.me/5518981328589. We reply during business hours.

cta.subtitle: Click below to secure your access or talk to us on WhatsApp.

whatsapp.message: Hi! I'd like to know more about Zelo BJJ
